script_lines.text: Okay, you've seen big things. You've seen small things. But have you seen THIS?
This is literally a tiny bike that fits in the palm of your hand.
No tricks. No CGI. A real, fully working build.
Meet the world's most impossibly small tiny bike.
The wheels? Smaller than your thumb.
custom-built from scratch — every component engineered at micro-scale.
It's so small, this guy just puts it in his bag like a textbook.
Then pulls it out and uses it… on the same roads as cars and trucks.
Yes — on the same roads as cars and trucks.
The look on people's faces? Absolute chaos. 😳
This is the kind of thing that makes you stop scrolling.
Science says we're drawn to unexpected scale — and this delivers.
It defies what a bike is supposed to be.
And honestly? That's exactly why it broke the internet.
If you found this satisfying — follow for more impossibly cool things.

qa.question: Is the tiny bike real or fake?
qa.answer: real — fully functioning pedals, drivetrain, steering, and brakes

qa.question: How is this even possible?
qa.answer: built from scratch with custom micro-scale components: special bearings, tiny chain or belt drive

qa.question: Is it safe to use in public?
qa.answer: rides on public roads but lacks standard safety features — more spectacle than recommendation

qa.question: Who made it?
qa.answer: attributed to a Russian builder known for miniature bike projects; @ClpQuips repackages with added commentary

qa.question: Why did this go viral?
qa.answer: unexpected scale violation + reaction shots. The brain is wired to notice things that break mental models

vo_styles.name: Energetic
vo_styles.description: Fast-paced, upward inflections, breathy excitement on key punch lines. 高能量, 150–160 BPM delivery. Best for shock-value, reaction-style edits.

vo_styles.name: Friendly
vo_styles.description: Conversational, warm tone, slight natural chuckle on 'chaos' or reaction lines. Think 'buddy showing you something wild at a garage sale.'

vo_styles.name: Professional
vo_styles.description: steady, measured, documentary-narration tone. Calm confidence on factual claims. Best for educational or breakdown-style Shorts.

production_notes.caption_placement: centered, bottom third, or keyword highlight per line style

music_tips.0-12s: build tension — low drone or rising swell
music_tips.12-24s: beat drop + comedic swell on reveal
